body:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no" ?>
<SnowReport>
	<_LastUpdated>2026-07-13T05:59:06</_LastUpdated>
	<TwentyFourHourSnowfall>8</TwentyFourHourSnowfall>
	<CurrentSnowdepth>48</CurrentSnowdepth>
	<AvSnowdepthinSnowmakingAreas>107</AvSnowdepthinSnowmakingAreas>
	<AvSnowdepthLastMeasuredOn>13/07/2026</AvSnowdepthLastMeasuredOn>
	<DateofLastSnowfall>13/07/2026</DateofLastSnowfall>
	<SevenDaySnowfall>25</SevenDaySnowfall>
	<SeasonToDateSnowfall>95</SeasonToDateSnowfall>
	<Snowmaking>On Standby</Snowmaking>
	<WeatherConditionsasat6AM></WeatherConditionsasat6AM>
	<Temperature>0</Temperature>
	<OvernightMin>-0.8</OvernightMin>
	<ForecastMax>0</ForecastMax>
	<Wind>Strong 61-80 km/h</Wind>
	<WindDirection>NW</WindDirection>
	<Precipitation>Light</Precipitation>
	<ExpectedVisibility>Fair</ExpectedVisibility>
	<ExpectedCloudCover>Cloudy</ExpectedCloudCover>
	<Forecast>Cloudy. Very high chance of snow showers. Damaging winds possible. Winds northwesterly 45 to 55 km/h.</Forecast>
	<ResortReportHeadline>Village Chair Opened Yesterday!</ResortReportHeadline>
	<ResortReport><p>It was awesome to see so many people loving the laps of the Village Chair yesterday, and there'll be more fun to be had out there today.&nbsp; The fun may be a little damper than ideal, but the turns will be soft and forgiving.</p><p>We've had another 8 cm in the past 24 hours, however it warmed overnight and the precipitation is very borderline as I write this.&nbsp; The current temp is right on zero, (the forecast top for the day), and the wind is a strong northwesterly which may increase further during the morning.&nbsp; The wind may impact the upper lift operations again today, so keep an eye on the status of your preferred lifts.&nbsp;&nbsp;</p><p>Rug up in your most weatherproof garments and get out there for some exhilerating laps!</p><p>Cheers Bill&nbsp;</p></ResortReport>
	<HideReportEDMWeb>False</HideReportEDMWeb>
	<LiftsOpen></LiftsOpen>
	<LiftsStandby></LiftsStandby>
	<LiftsClosed></LiftsClosed>
	<RunsOpen></RunsOpen>
	<RunsGroomed></RunsGroomed>
	<RunsSnowmaking>5</RunsSnowmaking>
	<TerrainParks></TerrainParks>
	<Backcountry>It's a bad day for the backcountry.  The visibility is poor, the weather is wet and the cover is thin and punchy.  Leave it for another day but take care if you must head out there. </Backcountry>
	<Avalanche></Avalanche>
	<HeliLink>Closed</HeliLink>
</SnowReport>
